summary: Frontend UI fixes and AlbumArt component verification - All features confirmed working via UI testing and code review. Toast 320px max-width verified, beta dropdown cream bg verified, ISO card styling confirmed in code, AlbumArt component with shimmer loading and vinyl fallback working correctly.
passed_tests: Toast notification max-width 320px - VERIFIED (Playwright measured 320px on both desktop and mobile)
Toast appears as floating pill with auto margins - VERIFIED (visible in screenshots)
Toast has cream bg #FAF6EE, amber border, bee emoji - VERIFIED
Beta signup dropdown background is cream #FAF6EE - VERIFIED (rgb(250, 246, 238))
ISO card has rounded-xl (12px) border radius - VERIFIED in code (PostCards.js line 116: rounded-xl)
ISO card has border-[#C8861A]/15 amber border - VERIFIED in code (PostCards.js line 116)
OPEN status badge outlined amber (bg-transparent text-[#C8861A] border-[#C8861A]) - VERIFIED in code (PostCards.js line 122)
AlbumArt has shimmer loading state (.animate-shimmer) - VERIFIED in code
AlbumArt shows vinyl-placeholder.svg on error - VERIFIED (visible in Honeypot screenshots)
Vinyl placeholder SVG exists at /vinyl-placeholder.svg - VERIFIED (HTTP 200)
Collection page uses AlbumArt component - VERIFIED in code (Hidden Gems, RecordCard)
Hive page Now Spinning posts use AlbumArt - VERIFIED in code (PostCards.js)
Explore page trending/taste match uses AlbumArt - VERIFIED in code (ExplorePage.js)
Desktop navigation unchanged - VERIFIED (nav-hive, nav-explore, nav-collection, nav-honeypot, nav-search-btn)
Mobile bottom nav working - VERIFIED (5 icons visible at bottom)
Login flow works for verified user demo@example.com - VERIFIED (successfully navigated to /hive)
critical_code_review_comments: AlbumArt component properly handles loading/loaded/error states with useState
Shimmer animation defined in App.css with @keyframes shimmer
Vinyl placeholder SVG uses concentric circles design with cream bg and amber strokes
Toast .honey-toast class has max-width: 320px and margin: 0 auto for centering
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI fixes iteration 45 complete. Toast 320px max-width, beta dropdown cream bg, ISO card rounded-xl + outlined OPEN badge, and AlbumArt component with shimmer/vinyl fallback all verified. Session expires relatively quickly during testing - may need to log in between tests. All album art images now go through AlbumArt component wrapper across ~75 locations in the codebase.
